name: Speckled Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Green beans in 1-inch pieces, or
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the white beans in water to cover by 2 inches overnight.
2. Drain the beans and cook them in the morning.
3. Sauté garlic, onion, celery, and carrots in oil for about 10 minutes.
4. Add the soaked beans and 4 cups of water or stock.
5. Simmer until the beans are tender, about 45 minutes.
6. Add basil and green beans or zucchini and simmer another 30 minutes or so until tender.
7. Before serving, stir in lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
